entity.name: Sen. Maria Cantwell
entity.description: Senator (D-WA), Commerce Committee chair (in D majority). Jurisdiction over NIST/AISI and Commerce AI authorities; shapes any AI legislation moving through Commerce. Pragmatic, industry-engaged given Microsoft/Amazon home-state base.

activity.title: Cantwell, Moran Introduce Bill to Boost AI Education
activity.raw_text: Senator Maria Cantwell (D-Wash.), Ranking Member of the Senate Committee on Commerce, Science and Transportation, and U.S. Senator Jerry Moran (R-Kan.), a senior member of the Commerce Committee, introduced the bipartisan NSF AI Education Act of 2026 to expand scholarship and professional development opportunities to study artificial intelligence with support from the National Science Foundation (NSF).

_verify_phrases: bipartisan NSF AI Education Act of 2026

activity.title: Cantwell, Young, Hickenlooper and Blackburn Reintroduce Bill to Ensure U.S. Leads Global AI Innovation
activity.raw_text: Senators Maria Cantwell (D-Wash.), Ranking Member of the Senate Committee on Commerce, Science and Transportation, Todd Young (R-Ind.), John Hickenlooper (D-Colo.) and Marsha Blackburn (R-Tenn.) today reintroduced the bipartisan Future of AI Innovation Act, which lays the foundation to maintain U.S. leadership in the global race to develop artificial intelligence (AI) and other emerging technologies. The legislation promotes strong partnerships between government, business, civil society and academia to advance AI research.

_verify_phrases: reintroduced the bipartisan Future of AI Innovation Act

source_entity.name: Sen. Maria Cantwell

activity.title: Cantwell, Moran Reintroduce Bill to Help Small Business Leverage AI Tools
activity.raw_text: Senator Maria Cantwell (D-Wash.), Ranking Member of the Senate Committee on Commerce, Science and Transportation, and U.S. Senator Jerry Moran (R-Kan.), a senior member of the Committee, reintroduced the bipartisan Small Business Artificial Intelligence Training Act of 2026 that would authorize the U.S. Department of Commerce (DOC) to work with the Small Business Administration (SBA) to create and distribute artificial intelligence (AI) training resources and tools to help small businesses leverage AI in their operations.

_verify_phrases: Small Business Artificial Intelligence Training Act of 2026
